name: FLYING J TRAVEL PLAZA COUNTRY MARKET

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. A case of food was stored on the floor in the walk in cooler.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. A sanitizer bucket was stored in the handwashing sink near the grille.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. An open employee energy drink was stored on the prep cutting board.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. A pan of cooked hamburgers on the edge of the grille maintained an internal temperature of 108 F.
